sub_fields.name: Cloud Engineer
sub_fields.description: Builds and manages cloud infrastructure using AWS, Azure, or GCP services.

languages.name: AWS
languages.description: Amazon Web Services — the largest cloud platform. Offers 200+ services for compute, storage, databases, and AI. Most job postings require AWS.

languages.name: Azure
languages.description: Microsoft's cloud platform. Strong in enterprise, hybrid cloud, and .NET integration. Growing fast in the Middle East market.

languages.name: Google Cloud
languages.description: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) — excels in data analytics, AI/ML services, and Kubernetes. Strong BigQuery and Vertex AI offerings.

languages.name: Terraform
languages.description: Infrastructure as Code tool by HashiCorp. Define cloud resources in code, version control your infrastructure, and deploy consistently.

sub_fields.name: DevOps Engineer
sub_fields.description: Automates software build, test, and deployment pipelines to enable rapid and reliable delivery.

languages.name: Docker
languages.description: Container platform that packages apps with dependencies. Essential for modern development — consistent environments from dev to production.

languages.name: Kubernetes
languages.description: Container orchestration system by Google. Manages deployment, scaling, and operations of containerized applications at scale.

languages.name: Jenkins
languages.description: Open-source CI/CD automation server. Automates building, testing, and deploying code. Widely used in enterprise DevOps pipelines.

languages.name: GitHub Actions
languages.description: CI/CD built into GitHub. Automate workflows directly from your repo — build, test, deploy. Free for public repos.

sub_fields.name: Site Reliability Engineer

languages.name: Python
languages.description: Versatile and beginner-friendly. Excels in data science, automation, web backends (Django/Flask), and AI/ML. Egypt's most in-demand language.

languages.name: Go
languages.description: Google's language built for speed and simplicity. Ideal for cloud infrastructure, microservices, and high-performance backends.

languages.name: Prometheus / Grafana
languages.description: Monitoring stack — Prometheus collects metrics, Grafana visualizes them. Industry standard for infrastructure and application observability.

languages.name: Ansible
languages.description: Agentless automation tool for IT infrastructure. Simple YAML-based playbooks for configuration management and app deployment.

languages.description: Network protocol analyzer. Capture and inspect network traffic in real-time. Essential tool for network troubleshooting and security analysis.
